name: ibge-br-mcp-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker that serves ibge-br-mcp over Streamable HTTP
//: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk and zod are intentionally NOT listed here — they resolve from the parent package's node_modules so there is a single SDK copy (avoids duplicate-instance type clashes with registerAll). If you extract this Worker to its own repo, add them as dependencies and depend on the published ibge-br-mcp package.
